hyperedges.label: Commit Patrol Path to Working State
Three-Layer Context Access Control (KNOWLEDGE > WORK > PERSONAL)

hyperedges.description: Brainstorming produces a design doc, which transitions to writing-plans for implementation planning, which uses planning-with-files 3-file pattern for task tracking.
teach-impeccable establishes design context first, then normalize aligns to system, distill simplifies, polish refines details, and critique evaluates the final result.
writing-skills meta-skill is supported by testing methodology (subagent testing), persuasion principles (rationalization resistance), and Anthropic's official best practices.

hyperedges.relation: Article integration stage (02:00) in the split nightly knowledge pipeline: lint (01:00) → article-notes-integration (02:00) → conversation-mining (03:00) → knowledge-flywheel-amplifier (04:00)
Daily cockpit flow: INBOX captures todos → todo-backlog (SSoT) feeds daily brief → daily brief references work context for decisions
Templates drive the knowledge lifecycle: article-note-template → article notes → article-notes-integration pipeline → knowledge base; project-brief-template → 05-PROJECTS registry → AI context

hyperedges.label: INBOX → Daily Brief → Weekly Plan → Monthly Milestones triage pipeline
Nightly digest processes INBOX items into knowledge base via 3-layer architecture
Context compression appears as both an active PR decision point and an extracted knowledge pattern
